ground_truth.title: Best Practices for Vehicle Rentals
ground_truth.main_content: A good risk management safety program requires proper screening of prospective renters to ensure that only qualified drivers operate your vehicles. Implementing sound practices at the rental counter is the first step in maintaining the safety and condition of your fleet of vehicles. Key topics discussed in the guide include: General procedures at the rental counter, For-hire vehicle rental steps, Rental practices for international drivers, Reporting losses, Renting vehicles with hand controls. Request our free ebook to learn more about ensuring fleet safety with proper renter screening and exploring rental counter procedures.

Implementing sound practices at the rental counter is the first step in maintaining the safety and condition of your fleet of vehicles.
